scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
scale.caption: text-sm text-slate-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider

layout.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl
layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8
layout.grid_features: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 md:gap-12

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100/50 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors

cards.feature: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 group
cards.pricing: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-8 flex flex-col h-full
cards.testimonial: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm border border-slate-100

inputs.default: flex h-12 w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100/50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-slate-600 is used on white backgrounds, text-slate-400 only for decorative or very large text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.

hero_product.alt: Amazing Pet Air Device - Sleek Medical Design

australian_context.usage: Homepage proof block or footer background

sections: Hero (Split layout: Value Prop Left, Product Image Right)
Use Cases Preview (Cards for Breeder, Groomer, Vet)

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
DO NOT use generic centered layouts for everything. Use split screens for the Hero to balance text and imagery.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all headings to give a modern, clinical feel.
Ensure the 'Compliance' section is visible but not intrusive (use a light gray background with distinct typography).
For the 'How It Works' section, use a horizontal process flow with connecting lines or arrows.
Use the specific image URLs provided in the 'assets' section. Do not use placeholders.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the features section using col-span classes.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Ensure all forms have proper validation states (red border for error, focus rings).
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications on form submission.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
